params.name: Inman Fluorescent Lamp
params.description:
On Oct 2, 1938 AD, Imman successfully produced the world's first fluorescent lamp.
The fluorescent lamp was based on the principles of gas discharge and the use of mercury vapor and a phosphorescent coating to produce visible light. Due to its high brightness and energy efficiency, it quickly became an indispensable household item.
